programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show | Magic & Makeovers
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad | Challenge Bowl!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity | Roblox Egg Hunt!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Noodly Fun!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Sprinter Galore
programme.desc: The good-hearted Sprinter Galore is back at his home planet, battling evil villains bent.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Sparkle Power
programme.desc: Power through the day with some sparkle and shine!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of The Elephant Bird
programme.desc: Nelson the Elephant feels like a change - he wants to be a bird. With help he takes to the air.

programme.title: Emma!: Brush Your Pet's Hair / Miss Polly Had A Dolly / Say The Dance, Do The Dance
programme.desc: Today is Brush Your Pet's Hair day! Emma finds a special brush in her music box that she uses to brush the hair of her friend Elvis the Puppy! / Today is Dramatic Play day! Emma finds a bandage from a doctor's bag in her music box and it inspires her to sing 'Miss Polly Had a Dolly'. Dramatic play means you can pretend to be anyone, so Emma pretends to be Miss Polly and the doctor. / Today is a dance challenge day! Emma finds a little dancer figurine in her music box. Then it's time for a dance challenge with Emma. If you say the dance, she can do the dance!

programme.title: Nature Knows with the Gumboot Kids: Wind
programme.desc: Join Scout, Daisy, Jessie and the Gumboot Kids as they learn about wind.

programme.title: GoGo Dino Explorers: The Long-Necked Brachiosaurus
programme.desc: The Gogo Dino Explorers come across Mrs. Bracky the Brachiosaurus in a meadow. Mrs. Bracky has a toothache, and the Professor will need anesthesia to help treat her. It is up to the Gogo Dinos to find the right herbs in the forest for making anesthesia.

programme.title: HeyKids: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss in Boots is a classic fairy tale about a cat who uses trickery to gain power, wealth, and the hand of a princess in marriage for his master.

programme.title: TuTiTu Animals: Baboon / Squirrel / Crab / Penguin
programme.desc: In this episode, TuTiTu is building a Baboon Toy, in which the kids can learn about the Baboon and its surrounding, all through a fun Peekaboo game.

programme.title: Bichikids: Ti-Ti the Butterfly
programme.desc: Enjoy, dance, sing and learn with Bichikids' best songs.

programme.title: The Chocolix: An Uncle Who Brings the Party / Goodventure Camp / The Chocobeard Treasure Part 1
programme.desc: Uncle Show appears at the Chocolix family home, and they were all in need of one of his chocolaty adventures. However, he soon tells them he's just passing through, because he needs to go help his friend, the King of Dreamland, who has a serious problem: the Children in his kingdom are having nightmares every night because of a spell that the Bitter Witch placed on them. Chocolyne recalls that if she still had the wish stone that Uncle Show had given her, they could solve the problem. But she gave the stone to her Fairy friend Flowery. Uncle Show has the idea of asking Flowery for help, and the Fairy faces her first mission: to spray the antidote-potion, prepared by the Master Fairy, over the children's houses. / The school children go to a holiday camp. There they compete in several competitive games. For this they decide to divide into two teams: boys versus girls.At the height of the competition, the children realize they have a problem and that the only alternative to solve it is to unite. They overcome the problem and remain united for the rest of the holiday. / Caramel's grandmother tells her and her friends Chocolyne, Chocomark and Max, the legend of pirate Choco Beard, who buried a valuable treasure in some corner of the Kingdom of Chocoland, putting several traps so that no one was able to find it. After hearing the story, the children get excited about the idea of looking for the treasure. During the search, they end up slipping into a deep hole where they finally come across the treasure, but can't get out. Concerned about the delay of their children, their parents go out looking for them. Sweetcookie, using her acute sense of smell, finds the children and is hailed as a hero.Part of the treasure is used to build a children's library and a giant Ferris wheel in the Chocoland square.

programme.title: Zoomoo Lost!: Flash and the Lions
programme.desc: Flash crash lands in Africa and is in danger of becoming dinner for some hungry lions.

programme.title: Ruby & Bonnie: The Best Stories About How Important it is to Wash Your Hands by Ruby and Bonnie
programme.desc: Ruby and Bonnie collection of stories as they need to wash her hands after eating but Bonnie has to be treated because she didn't listen. Some unexpected discoveries are made as germs are found.

programme.title: The Adventures of Bernie: The Giant Seaweed | The Fish Tamer | The Fan Battle
programme.desc: Bernie sees Barbara gardening, and is inspired to try and grow a plant that he can climb all the way up to the surface on, to be reunited with Zig! But the plant takes forever to grow.

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: Let's Rock
programme.desc: Rock collectors, Chip and Little Bigfoot, are on the hunt for a special, purple stone and Luna knows just where to find it. Before they set off, Inkie notices a tiny tear in the beaver's backpack. Better fix that hole before it gets bigger, Chip! But the beaver waves off her concern. He'll fix the little hole later. But as the group hikes, stops to enjoy the view, or chip off a piece of another cool rock, the hole grows bigger and bigger. All of Chip's adventure gear falls out along the path behind an oblivious Chip. Looks like that tiny problem just got really big!

programme.title: Hip Hop Harry Music Videos: ABC Song / Earth Day / Easter Egg Hunt / Go For It! / Go Go Go Who's Next Dance Circles
programme.desc: Listen to this awesome ABC rap from Hip Hop Harry! He'll teach you all about the letters of the alphabet in this awesome hip hop song. / Hip Hop Harry is going to take you on a tour of the planet Earth and show you some of the most beautiful parts of it. From lush forests to deep blue oceans to the animals we share this world with--there is much worth protecting! / Enjoy this original kids rap music video from Hip Hop Harry all about how much fun it is to go on an Easter egg hunt with your friends and family! An Easter egg hunt is when you, your parents, and the Easter Bunny hide eggs around various places outside and you go and look for them. They are a ton of fun! This video will also go over how to paint an Easter egg, where the best places are to have an Easter egg hunt (such as your backyard, a friend's house, or at school) and how these activities are a great way for families to spend time together! / Check out this awesome dance video from Hip Hop Harry all about following your dreams and going for it, no matter how far away they may seem!This is a brand new rap version of "Go Go Go Who's Next?" is accompanied by an awesome dance routine featuring Hip Hop Harry and a crew of amazing b-boy breakdancers. This video is inspirational and fun for kids of all ages.Try to follow along with the dance moves at home or make up your own dance moves! / Dance along with Hip Hop Harry and the whole Hip Hop Central crew in this collection of dance circles. Hip Hop Harry's infectious "Go, Go, Go" song will have you on your feet and moving to the beat in no time!

programme.title: Car City Super: Super Truck: Fire Truck Stops the Slime Attack
programme.desc: Some bad guy is shooting slime all over the city. Super Truck tries to clean it by turning into a Firetruck. But to clear everything up AND stop the bad guy he's going to have to team up with Frank too!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Fran's Fruit Truck / Sparky's Spaceship

Fran heads into the car wash and drives out as shiny as the apple she hands Carl! / Sparky the alien is on his way to Quasar's Market when he takes a joyride through the goopy rings around Saturn. programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Paramore is the guy you fight to sit next to in a movie theatre, on a long car ride, or during a boring lecture. His natural ability to infuse everyday situations with energetic, uplifting humor, combined with a natural ability to put you at ease is key to his personal brand of comedy. His smooth delivery and? powerful punchlines make him a force in stand-up comedy, which is very apparent in his debut album "The Things We Tell Ourselves", available now on iTunes and Amazon. Mike has opened for comedians like Damon Wayans, Cash Cab's Ben Baily, Jon Lovitz, and Saturday Night Live's Jay Pharoah.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Benny lives in Brooklyn where he fiddles around with old Land Rovers when he is supposed to be helping his wife run her natural skincare business. He has a dog named Grits and two cats who prefer that he not share their personal information in this bio.

programme.title: Michael Joiner
programme.desc: Michaelís brand of comedy is, in a word, familiar. Not in the sense that youíve heard it before, but more so that he knows you and you know him. He speaks about the things you are thinking in a way that sounds so much like your inner voice it is astounding. His effortless delivery will resonate with you. Michael is the 1st Place winner of the Hollywood Improv's "FUNNIEST COMIC IN L.A." 2008, and 2010 Christian Music Hall of Fame "COMEDIAN OF THE YEAR" nominee, Joiner has attracted wide praise for his routines that blend a sarcastic edginess with a devotion to clean humor. Joiner has headlined at The LA AREA Improvs, The Funny Bone, The Ice House and other comedy clubs across the country while also performing at colleges and sold out Clean Comedy Concerts nationwide. He's also written for "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno." He has been performing nationwide for over 25 years and is rated one of the nation's funniest Clean Stand-up Comedians. The TV Guide Network calls Michael "One of the funniest, most original, stand up Comedians working today!" In 2006, Michael was one out of only four Comedians chosen worldwide to star in the top selling DVD, "The Clean Stand Up Comedy Tour." Unlike many Comedians who stick to their rehearsed script, Michael's stand up comedy show includes some of the most clever, hilarious improv and audience interaction you will ever experience.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Iraq War veteran Josh Novey takes the stage with an easy-going presence and jokes about Waffle House, kindly threatening his audience, and tickling grizzly bears.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Who goes from being a mild-mannered nationally recognized college a Capella group vocal percussionist to becoming a high-energy, intelligent, physical, and downright silly beatboxing comedian? None other than Comedian Tyler Boeh, who shifted his focus from singing a Capella (a word he describes as Latin for “Without Girlfriend”) when he won a comedy contest in Portland Oregon. After winning and placing in the finals of numerous Comedy Competitions from San Francisco to Seattle to Boston to The World Series of Comedy, Boeh not only launched a great career in comedy including television appearances, colleges, cruise ships and headlining clubs, he also found a girlfriend. Tyler's comedy CD was chosen by LaughSpin Magazine as the Best Comedy Album of 2012 and you may have seen him on such shows as Celebrity Name Game, Moms Rule, Nesn Comedy All Stars, or heard him on SIRIUS radio. Don't miss a chance to see Tyler live.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Rob Maher: If You Can Make It Here...
programme.desc: Rob Maher proves that he has the most versatile first name in the English language, that your relationship ended because you didn't spend enough money on wrapping paper, and that being an "accident" is worse than being adopted.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Moody was born “Matthew” in Syracuse, NY, into a rambunctious household with six siblings. (They're Irish...somebody had to get a nickname.) He began doing comedy in 1992 and was soon hired by Syracuse's top morning radio show to cover sports and write jokes, his first loves. After six years of working the road, Moody moved to New York City. This millennium has been good to Moody: he's also been featured on Last Comic Standing, Star Search (the 2003 reboot), and America's Got Talent. He's a regular at the best clubs in the land (including the world famous Comedy Cellar) and can be heard on SiriusXM. Moody's material is described as original but universal, and smart without being trite. Couple that with a disarming stage presence & in-the-moment chops, you'll see why he's earned the admiration of his peers for his ability to “go up cold” and turn any setting into a hot room. From corporate outings to pubs, this versatile performer will brighten any event.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Alex Velluto is a stand-up comedian and Diet Coke drinker from Salt Lake City, Utah. He has performed at comedy festivals all over the country including the Boston Comedy Festival, Big Sky Comedy Festival, and the Seattle International Comedy Competition. He was named “Best of Fest” at the Golden Spike Comedy Festival and is the winner of the Finger Lakes Comedy Festival in Ithaca, NY. In 2016, Alex was voted “Best Comedian” by City Weekly Magazine. His debut comedy special “Alex Velluto: Spurious” is currently streaming on Amazon.com.

programme.title: Jim Breuer Let's Clear The Air

programme.title: Jim Breuer… And Laughter For All

programme.title: Finding Boaz
programme.desc: Church administrator, Torrey, attempts to put the pieces of her life together after a failed engagement. With fears of becoming a lonely cat lady, Torrey solicits the help of her worldly cousin Nell who puts Torrey in a How to Catch a Man School. Class includes, makeovers, shopping sprees, club hopping and tactics of deceit to help Torrey find the man of her dreams. Within the twists and turns of How to Catch a Man School, Torrey catches far more than she bargained for!

programme.title: Hair, Love and Racism
programme.desc: Karen grew up heavily influenced by her right-wing family. Her whole life she thought people were treated equally regardless of race. Her new home, city, and boyfriend show her a different reality.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: A hit man (Michael Shannon) keep his violent profession secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and kids.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.title: Double Identity
programme.desc: An American doctor (Val Kilmer) takes a detour in life and becomes a victim of mistaken identity when he helps a mysterious woman (Izabella Miko) escape from her would-be assailant.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: Amores que Engañan

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: El Talismán - Amenaza: Camila y Pedro quieren terminar con Antonio. Antonio amenaza a Pedro con llevarse lejos a Camila. Mientras se realizan las bodas, Pedro se escapa.

programme.title: Vino el amor
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Expiando culpas
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Traición en la mira
programme.desc: Alejandro escucha los planes de Mili y Hugo para irse de luna de miel e invita a Florencia a irse de viaje a la playa. Florencia ve a Alejandro besando a Mili. Constancio decide ayudar a Mateo para que se quede con la empresa de Domingo.

programme.title: Vino el amor
programme.desc: David le dice a Fernanda que va a oficializar su relación con Graciela. Por otro lado, Marta espera que David le de la oportunidad de cuidar a sus hijos nuevamente.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa y Aurora se encuentran con Rubén en la primera comunión del hermano de Esperanza. Teresa se pone celosa al ver a Aurora cerca de Mariano. La familia de Esperanza se entera de que Rubén es casado. Esperanza encuentra a Rubén con Genoveva.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Adolfo y Ezequiel hacen explotar el coche del almirante Robledo. Amelia le cuenta a Fabiola la verdadera historia de Graciela.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Jose Luis corre a Rosario de la casa. Ezequiel le confiesa a Carlota que el padre Anselmo sigue vivo gracias a él. José Luis arresta a Fabiola por fraude. María se disfraza de Montserrat para meterse en la cama de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: La Gata: Fuerte amenaza

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Convencimiento
programme.desc: Cynthia enfurece al saber que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula. Macaria entristece al saber que Ulises está cada vez menos interesado en recuperar su matrimonio. Rosaura le ruega a Bruno que convenza a Rogelio que busque a Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Celos
programme.desc: Bruno le propone a Katia que se vean en un hotel. Alex comienza a sospechar de Meche. Fernando siente celos al ver a Victoria con Hernán.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer discuten sobre la boda de sus abuelos. En el noticiero "DMS por la noche", los locutores discuten sobre las noticias que exponen. El máximo exponente de la cinematografía, don Oscar, muestra sus mejores películas.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Doña Chivis aumenta la renta del departamento, y la Nena empieza a vender tartas caseras para poder pagarla. El administrador descubre el agujero que conecta la casa de los López con la del vecino y avisa a la propietaria legítima.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Declaración de amor
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Giovanni tiene muchos problemas para escribir una carta dirigida al director. Jose se enoja con Roberta porque no le contó que Teo la engaña con Raquel. Roberta planea destruir Rebelde. Mia logra que Selina le confiese su plan.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego y sus amigos hacen un plan para que Roberta vaya a su departamento. Sol vierte pegamento en el cabello de Mia. Roberta rechaza a Iñaki porque ella no quiere tener novio. Mia les muestra a sus amigas que recuperó su cama en el dormitorio.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Luján quiere renunciar a la escuela. Alma se preocupa cuando encuentra una carta de Roberta donde le dice que se irá por unos días, pero Roberta ha decidido irse de manera definitiva. Roberta se deprime al recordar su solitaria infancia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia contrata a un estilista para que le quite el pegamento que Sol le echó en el cabello. Diego le confiesa a Iñaki que pasó la noche con Roberta. Mia cobra venganza y le juega una broma pesada a Sol.

programme.title: A Killer's Mistake
programme.desc: Kent McGowen was obsessed with the idea of being a ‘Superman Cop'. He was so obsessed that he was willing to go against official procedures and manipulate evidence in order to set up a scenario involving one arrest, and another arrest warrant for 42-year old mother Susan Diane Harrison - who had previously complained about him. McGowen then willingly executed the arrest warrant himself, all through unlawful means. Susan was killed just 6 seconds after McGowen forcefully entered her home. To this day the convicted murderer insists on his innocence - that he asked Susan to lower her gun and acted in self-defence after a stand-off. But nothing adds up. The autopsy acts as a roadmap to the truth.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Caroline and Josh see Real Potential
programme.desc: The very pregnant Caroline and Josh need out of his parents' house, where they're bunking to save money. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses, in which they can build a family. And it must happen asap as Caroline's due in a month! Once Caroline and Josh buy, Sarah renovates the one room that stands out as b-a-d. Baby arrives just as Sarah and crew bring this room to the finish line!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Tova and Marnie see Real Potential
programme.desc: After slogging through over a hundred open houses and losing numerous bidding wars Tova and Marnie are itching to get out of their tiny condo. Sarah comes to the rescue, showing them the potential in three houses that offer the space and practicality they each crave. Once Tova and Marnie buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that takes it from so-so to hellooo!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Andrea and Wayne see Real Potential
programme.desc: As this newlywed's family starts to grow it's time for their home to do the same. Andrea and Wayne are hunting for charm and character that for one means turnkey and for the other means DIY. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses that are livable, but somewhat needy. Once Andrea and Wayne buy, Sarah renovates the room they can't figure out, setting them on course for future renos!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Truc and Eric see Real Potential
programme.desc: Judging by Truc's massive shoe collection and Eric's DJ gear, these two have long grown out of their tiny city apartment. Their failed home to date search has been driven solely by charm and character. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes that tick these boxes with extra storage to boot. Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Evette and Jason see Real Potential
programme.desc: After two-years of renting in the suburbs Evette and Jason are ready to commit. The issue: while the houses they've been viewing hare new, they're surprisingly not very well cared for. Sarah shows them the potential of three suburban homes, trying to mitigate the quirks they've seen time and again. Once Evette and Jason buy, Sarah wrangles sense and style into the one room in their new home that remains a puzzle!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Vanessa and Troy see Real Potential
programme.desc: Vanessa and Troy are blending their two condos into one home they can finally call their own. Trouble is, when viewing homes Vanessa can't help but be swayed by the homeowners' taste to make an informed decision. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, helping this pair see past aesthetics. Once Vanessa and Troy buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that for them is the biggest disaster!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Some foods are sexy because of their texture or flavor, and some are sexy because of how they're served. These are the foods we'd cook for a very important evening. A lush seafood stew with scallops, shrimp, mussels, clams and Pernod, a whole-leaf Caesar salad made to be eaten with your fingers, and a silken Caramel Panna Cotta. We'll visit Greystone, one of the oldest buildings in the valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: We take you along to the biggest charity event in the Napa Valley and then come back home to make some late-night favorites: a home-style onion soup, a spicy spaghetti Amatriciana, and dried-fruit compote flavored with Sambuca.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: When the temperature drops, foods should deepen in flavor. These are the dishes we make when it's cold outside. A Chicken Bolognaise that's lower in fat than the traditional version, Fennel Roasted Vegetables, and a cheesecake made with flavorful mascarpone.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Pesto is much more than basil and pine nuts. Learn the technique and make tomato pesto (with our infamous flowerpot chicken and bruschetta), walnut pesto and even your own pesto with the flavors you choose. Meet some olive growers who make olive oil in the Napa Valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Italians make this bread and vegetable salad in the summer with fresh tomatoes and garlic. We show how to make it all year long, with a springtime asparagus panzanella, a classic summer version, and with veal medallions to serve as a main course. We'll tour Main Street, St. Helena, and see some of the valley's most charming stores and restaurants.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: When guests stop by and leave little time for preparation, there are easy fix-its. Tuna Tomatoes and Salmon Tartare on Cauliflower Salad are beautiful "do ahead" dishes for lunch or a first course. Breaded Pork Scaloppine with Mushroom Sauce, Chickpea Ragout and Caramelized Peaches can be prepared as a perfect evening supper.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques believes in great food everyday. As long as the ingredients are on hand, Prosciutto and Figs or Crab Cakes in Red Sauce need not be saved for special occasions. Pasta, Ham, and Vegetable Gratin can make use of leftover meats and vegetables and creates a nice balance when served with a salad of Romaine and Radicchio with Salsa Dressing. Big Almond Macaroons make any day feel special.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Inspired by his mother, Jeannette, Jacques prepares an Egg and Tomato Gratin and Greens with Quick Cream Dressing. His wife Gloria inspired the first course, Smoked Whitefish Tartine. Stuffed Scallops on Mushroom Rice and Pineapple Wedges in Caramel would inspire anyone wanting great food!

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: A sit-down dinner with family and friends doesn't have to be formal. Devil Shrimp, Sausage and Potato Packets with Homemade Mustard, Mushroom and Walnut Salad in Sour Cream Dressing, and Apple Peel Granité with Apple Purée are dishes that bring the ease of a picnic inside. Jacques assembles a plate full of Basil, Cheese, Fig, and Nut Bites, an easy light lunch or a perfect cheese course.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Sometimes the key to fast food is a well-stocked refrigerator and pantry. Leftover vegetables become a Pépin favorite with Jacques' Instant Vegetable Soup, also known as "fridge soup." By combining a few fresh products and kitchen staples, it is simple to prepare a Lavash Pizza, Halibut on Fresh Polenta with Pepper Oil, Pole Beans with Shallots, and Hasty Pudding with Apricot Sauce.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: First, Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck. Next, Matt, Froy, and Lou bring the debtors to the ground when they head out to repo a back hoe tractor. And finally, Froy, Lou, and Lyndah bully their way through a bunch of ignorant punk kids to grab some four wheelers.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?
programme.desc: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity. Next, Matt and Froy stand in the way of a drugged debtor keeping his car. And finally, it's time for some ice cream for Lou, Froy, and Sonia when they head out to repo an ice cream truck.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments. Then, Matt and Froy deal with an unhelpful citizen when they have to repossess from a cop. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt deal with another repossessor when trying to repo a repo truck, until Lou can get on scene and offer the debtor a deal.

programme.title: Hairy Situations
programme.desc: First, things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop. Next, everybody's crying when Lou and Froy's repossession from a young couple ends with a pepper spray to everyone's face. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou repo the targeted car while Matt stands his ground with a family of thugs.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Sirens
programme.desc: Lilas and Shery, co-founders and guitarists of the Middle East's first all-female metal band, wrestle with friendship, sexuality and destruction in their pursuit of becoming thrash metal rock stars. Directed by Rita Baghdadi.

programme.title: On Her Shoulders

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Hardly any other area is as unspoiled as the Yukon Delta in western Alaska. This fascinating network of swamps and river arms looks like a landscape at the beginning of mankind. Only 25,000 people live in this barren region, which is almost as big as Greece. Most of these inhabitants are indigenous and belong to the ethnic group of the Yupik. They make their living on the steep banks of the Yukon River. And in their villages, built on piles to protect them against flooding, you can see the effects of climate changes on nature - and on the community life of the indigenous population. On the trail of the national fish of Alaska, the salmon, the film follows the Yukon River and follows moose hunters, migratory birds and scientists who do research in the delta.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

programme.title: River Jaws
programme.desc: Wells catfish! Over the last fifty years, it has colonised most of Europe's rivers - even the most polluted. This intruder has become the largest freshwater animal in Europe, and even hunts on shore ... 3 years of intense filming were necessary to capture this unique wildlife film.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Crane Cannon Launch/Trash Scavenger Hunt/Heli Body Drag
programme.desc: This episode featured four pairs as teams. First, it's the human cannonball. As a truck drives along a pier with a crane hanging off the side, one team member hangs from a crane and then into the water they light the fuse to giant cannon. Their partner is shot out of the cannon and into the water, swim to a boat and clip a flag to a flagpole. The team to finish fastest chooses team to be eliminated. Next, it's a trash can buffet scavenger hunt. Teams dig through dumpsters and barrels to find items. The team to match four items fastest would win a four-day trip to Las Vegas and $20,000. No one would be eliminated. The final stunt is a real drag. Team members hanging on to handlebars attached to a helicopter and are dragged across pavement on their stomachs. They have to let go as close to the finish line as possible. The team to get the least combined distance from the finish line would win $50K. The home invasion stunt goes to Dubuque, Iowa.

programme.desc: In the final challenge before Fashion Week, the designers take a surprise trip to Austin, Texas, where the city's unofficial slogan is “Keep Austin Weird!” Once there, the designers are faced with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, leading them to create amazing (and weird!) pieces with the knowledge that the losing designer will be sent home just one step away from Fashion Week. Guest judge Priyanka Chopra joins.
